    [Image] or [Truncated image[            Bcol      Ecol
L1
    [logger]                                1         7
    [.]                                     7         8
    [info]                                  8         12
    [(]                                     12        13
    [`]                                     13        14
    [Running action on event: ]             14        39
    [${]                                    39        41
    [githubConfig]                          41        53
    [.]                                     53        54
    [event]                                 54        59
    [.]                                     59        60
    [name]                                  60        64
    [}]                                     64        65
    [ with mode: ]                          65        77
    [${]                                    77        79
    [config]                                79        85
    [.]                                     85        86
    [mode]                                  86        90
    [}]                                     90        91
    [`]                                     91        92
    [)]                                     92        93
    [;]                                     93        94
L3
    [export]                                1         7
    [default]                               8         15
    [createStyleSheet]                      16        32
    [`]                                     32        33
    [\n    * {\n        box-sizing: bor[    33        21
L8
    [${]                                    21        23
    [(]                                     23        24
    [{]                                     24        25
    [theme]                                 26        31
    [}]                                     32        33
    [)]                                     33        34
    [=>]                                    35        37
    [theme]                                 38        43
    [.]                                     43        44
    [colors]                                44        50
    [.]                                     50        51
    [status]                                51        57
    [.]                                     57        58
    [infoDark]                              58        66
    [}]                                     66        67
    [;\n        color: ]                    67        16
L9
    [${]                                    16        18
    [(]                                     18        19
    [{]                                     19        20

    [}]                                     27        28

    [=>]                                    30        32
    [theme]                                 33        38
    [.]                                     38        39

    [.]                                     45        46
    [status]                                46        52
    [.]                                     52        53
    [neutral]                               53        60
    [}]                                     60        61
    [;\n    }\n    div, label, p, span [    61        27
L21
    [${]                                    27        29
    [(]                                     29        30
    [{]                                     30        31
    [theme]                                 32        37
    [}]                                     38        39
    [)]                                     39        40
    [=>]                                    41        43

    [.]                                     49        50
    [colors]                                50        56

    [backgrounds]                           57        68
    [.]                                     68        69
    [page]                                  69        73
    [}]                                     73        74
    [;\n        margin: 0;\n        pad[    74        7
L28
    [`]                                     1         2
    [;]                                     2         3
EOF
